ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Karpen, Esq. appearing in propria persona 706-1197, demurring party
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. of BORNSTEIN & BORNSTEIN 409-7611, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
* PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY delivered COURTESY COPIES OF THE DEMURRER AND ALL PAPERS TO COURT IN ADVANCE OF HEARING SIGN-IN BY 9:15 AM.
** DEFENDANTs JENNIFER KARPEN and Michael Recchia's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO APR-04-03 EX PARTE ORDER -- tentative ruling was to Overrule the demurrer, 5 days leave to answer. Defendant submitted to the tentative and therefore the Court adopted its tentative ruling. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780
